# function: cidrnoverlap

Returns true if no pair of CIDR prefixes in the list overlaps. All elements must be in CIDR notation and the same address family (IPv4 or IPv6). An empty list or single-element list returns true.



## Signature

<!-- signature generated by tfplugindocs -->
```text
cidrnoverlap(prefixes list of string) bool
```

## Arguments

<!-- arguments generated by tfplugindocs -->
1. `prefixes` (List of String) List of CIDR prefix strings to check for mutual non-overlap
